parameters.body: {"model":"sonar","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"What are the latest developments in: 1) IoT sensors for traffic management and road safety, 2) battery technology for portable outdoor equipment, 3) lightweight materials for safety barriers, 4) AI/computer vision for traffic monitoring, 5) solar power for portable devices? Focus on commercially available or near-commercial technologies from the past 30 days."}]}

={"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","max_tokens":2000,"system":"Extract technology findings relevant to TAS (maker of PB4000 portable boom barriers and MINIBOOM TZ30 with IoT). Score relevance 0-100. Return JSON array: [{\"technology_name\": \"...\", \"category\": \"iot_sensors|battery|materials|software|ai|manufacturing\", \"summary\": \"...\", \"relevance_to_tas\": \"...\", \"relevance_score\": N, \"maturity\": \"research|prototype|commercial|mature\", \"potential_impact\": \"cost_reduction|new_capability|competitive_advantage\"}]. Only include items with relevance_score >= 50.","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Research: " + JSON.stringify($json)}]}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO tech_scout (technology_name, category, summary, relevance_to_tas, relevance_score, maturity, potential_impact) VALUES ('{{$json.technology_name}}', '{{$json.category}}', '{{$json.summary}}', '{{$json.relevance_to_tas}}', {{$json.relevance_score}}, '{{$json.maturity}}', '{{$json.potential_impact}}');

meta.description: Thursday 4 AM — scouts emerging technologies relevant to TAS products (IoT, battery, materials, AI). Stores in tech_scout.
